entry.title: 965 miles
entry.summary:
Author: Leyly

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,862Chapters: 3/6Kudos: 6

Summary: In which Chris has a thankless job, Stiles is the president's mean and moody son who lacks freedom, and Derek is on a motorbike. There's also a stuffed wolf, a leather jacket, a rock festival, and Tony Bennett.

entry.title: My mother cursed Derek (english version)
entry.summary:
Author: Marlowe89

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,720Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 68

Summary: Stiles is tired of always being the second best, never anyone's priority. He loves Derek madly, and because of this unrequited feeling, he decides to cast a spell to erase all the emotional attachment he had. Mother Claudia, a ghost who haunts her child, decides to curse Derek.

entry.title: Abandoned Avatar
entry.summary:
Author: SterekTw

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 98,855Chapters: 28/?Kudos: 165

Summary: After being tortured by Gerard Stiles gets kicked out of the pack and abonded by his friends. The sheriff sends him to his mother's brother to stay for the summer but the world is in danger and Stiles and his new friends seem to be the only ones who can save it..

entry.title: Face To Face?
entry.summary:
Author: IgotStile_5

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,456Chapters: 3/15Kudos: 38

Summary: Derek moves back home after 4 years to finish his last years of college at beacon university. He misses his uncle Peter, ant Melissa, and of course, his little brother Scott. He wants to move home and rebuild the hale house. So he moves back to become hills, and on his first day back he ends up face to face with the hottest guys he has ever seen. But not only is he face to face with the hottest guys he has ever seen, to top it all off he is butt naked…..interesting. (Derek is going to collage to be an architect, stiles is going to be a criminologist, Scott is going to be a veterinarian……. Derek is 4 years older then them)

entry.title: Two Minutes
entry.summary:
Author: SashaDoeDeer

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,133Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 68

Summary: “This is sheriff Noah John Stilinski of the Beacon Hills Sheriff’s Office. The date is February twenty second, twenty fourteen. The hour is six thirty-two AM. This is the questioning of Derek Hale, age twenty-six, regarding the events of Mieczyslaw “Stiles” Stilinski’s kidnapping. Under California Penal Code section two-zero-nine, this case qualifies for both asportation and aggravated kidnapping. Life without parole is a guaranteed charge if a confession or incriminating speech to use in prosecution is recorded." Derek listens to every word. He's been in trouble with the law before and it's never really bothered him before, but this is new territory. He can't get locked up because then Stiles won't have someone to scent him, or clean his wounds, or protect him against the doctors from the institute who are certainly looking for them. Christ, Stiles must be so defenseless right now. Derek has to clear this up here and now; it doesn't matter how much he’ll have to apologize to Stiles for saying every vulnerable, dehumanizing little thing they went through to his father.

entry.title: Every Flavor of You
entry.summary:
Author: ProLuna

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,769Chapters: 12/40Kudos: 36

Summary: Derek Hale is a high school student who does his best to keep to himself. Until, he ends up with Stiles Stilinski as a lab partner. Derek is an unmovable object, but Stiles is an unstoppable force, and their meeting has consequences across the multiverse. This is a multiverse story. There is (temporary) major character death, and universes where minor characters have long been dead. There are a lot of stopovers into non-graphic portrayals of lots of different classic AUs. This includes a brief time where they are in an A/B/O AU and where there is brief mpreg. There are lots of other AUs they will stop in, but I wanted to list those two things in particular in case they squick anyone out so badly that even non-graphic representations of them are too much, so you can make your own choices. This story was originally my NaNoWriMo project, posted on my Tumblr. It is now complete and fully edited for AO3. The essence of the story hasn't changed, but I had to do a lot of pacing and characterization edits that weren't possible at the speed of NaNo.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: If I could turn back time..... oh wait, I can!
entry.summary:
Author: Werewolfintraining

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 85,782Chapters: 23/?Kudos: 326

Summary: Agent Stilinski received the call late afternoon. He had to return to the Hellmouth in a hurry. He really thought there was enough time. He was prepared to face the demon once again. He was not prepared to see Derek Hale sacrifice himself, again.He has one chance, the cost is high, but Derek and his pup are worth it.He's willing to pay whatever the magic deems worthy.He pays in years, but he gains something unexpected.Ok. Now he's here. Is he supposed to save Peter too?

entry.title: Stiles Stilinski Is Not OKay
entry.summary:
Author: GhastlyHollow

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,058Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 27

Summary: Kicked out of the pack with no friends and no one to turn to, Stiles Stilinski uses the isolation to focus on herself especially now that strange supernatural changes are happening to her body. Haunted by nightmares of the Nemeton and visions of her dead mother, Stiles struggles to figure out what’s real and what isn’t as her reality begins to collapse.Meanwhile, killings start up again in Beacon Hills, as tensions rise and old alliances fall apart, Stiles finds herself uncovering a much darker truth hiding beneath it all.And through everything, through the danger, the isolation, and the fear of what she might be becoming she’s still hopelessly, painfully in love with one sour wolf.

entry.summary:
Author: redandblue

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,238Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 26

Summary: To destroy a deadly drug cartel, agent Derek Hale goes undercover as a desperate junkie. But when college kid Stiles stumbles into a deal, Derek must maintain the dangerous act to save the boy's life. Warning: Contains depictions of drug use! Sterek AU

entry.title: good boy
entry.summary:
Author: sparassiss

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,267Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 21

Summary: “I’m so glad you had a good day,” Stiles tells him, still smiling contentedly, lips against his stubbled cheek. “Such a good boy.” Derek inhales, praise he’s been waiting for all day running through him like a wave of warmth. He says nothing in response but looks up at Stiles with eyes betraying how good the words make him feel. It’s all he wants, to be good. For someone to tell him that, instead of all the things he’s been called before. Or, five times Stiles calls Derek a good boy, and one time he starts to believe it.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Betrothed (But Not to You)
entry.summary:
Author: Klam (Scared_Beings_in_the_Dark)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,111Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 32

Summary: The Hale family is very much alive, very much werewolves, and more than a little… weird. Stiles is a failing portrait artist hired by the mysterious Hales to paint their son's betrothal portrait. Neither Stiles nor Derek plan to fall in love, but things happen. Who is Derek betrothed to, anyway? And why is no one happy about it? Stiles just needs to paint Derek's portrait – how hard could it be?  A story by write_light, inspired by the artwork of the same name by Klam (shared below).

entry.title: Marked
entry.summary:
Author: Cwoffee_is_Life

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,431Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 117

Summary: Stiles has spent years keeping his secrets exactly that — secret. Layered shirts, careful angles, a very practiced talent for misdirection. Beacon Hills is complicated enough without adding shifter to the list of things nobody can know. He wasn't planning on Derek finding out. He definitely wasn't planning on what came after.

entry.title: Canon Divergence (Unfortunately Real)
entry.summary:
Author: Fanficandfries

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 766Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 11

Summary: Stiles returns with “more research,” and the pack quickly realizes that AO3 has only gotten more accurate—and more insulting. Between painfully precise character analyses, emotionally devastating Thiam interpretations, and Sterek AUs that feel uncomfortably plausible, everyone is forced to confront the internet’s collective opinion of their lives. Derek attempts to opt out of literary analysis and fails. Scott discovers he is canonically “the emotional support system.” Liam suffers through yet another round of Thiam content while Theo reacts with unsettling approval. By the end, the pack reaches a consensus: the internet is wrong about many things, but never about them.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Liam Dunbar/Theo Raeken
  • Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski
  • Theo Raeken
  • Liam Dunbar
  • Stiles Stilinski

entry.title: Cultural Immersion (Against Their Will)
entry.summary:
Author: Fanficandfries

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 885Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 8

Summary: Stiles intentionally introduces the pack to their online fandom, framing it as “educational.” It is not educational. It is AO3. Within minutes, everyone is confronted with painfully accurate fanfiction about their lives—complete with ship tags, coffee shop AUs, emotional damage, and suspiciously accurate character analysis. Derek is horrified by barista fiction. Scott realizes he is canonically “the one holding everything together.” Liam and Theo discover they are internet-famous as an enemies-to-lovers slow burn and immediately attempt denial, which only makes it worse. By the end, the pack learns two things: the internet knows too much, and Stiles cannot be trusted with a laptop and free time.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Internet Was a Mistake”
entry.summary:
Author: Fanficandfries

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 909Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 13

Summary: Stiles shows the pack a TikTok edit of Derek and accidentally reveals they have an entire online fandom. Within minutes, Beacon Hills is flooded with edits, AO3 fanfiction, and ship wars. Derek suffers immediate psychological damage. Scott is confused. Peter is delighted. Mason spirals. And Liam and Theo quietly endure being the internet’s favorite “they’re definitely dating but won’t admit it” couple. Nobody recovers.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Someone Else's Tupperware
entry.summary:
Author: ModeratelyScathed

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,896Chapters: 1/7Kudos: 26

Summary: The funny thing is, Stiles actually has no idea who just climbed through his window. Doesn't really care, either. All he wants to do is catch a few hours of uninterrupted sleep before the nightmares drag him back to consciousness.Again.Still, he expects some sort of snarky response if it's Derek or Peter. Or maybe the vocal embodiment of Scott's puppy dog eyes if it's his best friend.He doesn't expect several seconds of silence.And he definitely doesn't expect the sudden and unmistakable thump of a body hitting the ground.

entry.summary:
Author: milkyway

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,988Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 9

Summary: After Derek is cursed, the most vulnerable version of himself emerges during a late-night grocery run. In the fluorescent quiet of a nearly empty supermarket, Stiles must convince the man he loves that he is finally safe.

entry.title: My Name is Ours at Night
entry.summary:
Author: strawberry_chicken

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 34,717Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 51

Summary: (End season 2) After a ritual gone wrong, Stiles should be dead. Instead, he wakes up with a hole in his body and something inside him—something wrong, something hungry. Derek knows there's a threat in town. He just didn't expect it to look like Stiles.
